hero.bio: Building high-performance web experiences where code meets motion. GSAP · WebGL · React · Spline.

about.heading: Engineering
about.intro: I'm a technical architect specializing in the transition from static logic to immersive, motion-driven web systems. I don't just build websites — I build experiences.

blocks.title: The Philosophy
blocks.body: The modern web belongs to those who move the fastest. By integrating AI-driven logic into my workflow, I bypass manual friction to focus on what truly matters: creating high-performance, immersive systems that respond to user intent with surgical precision.

blocks.title: The Approach
blocks.body: I leverage AI-augmented development to accelerate the architectural process, allowing me to focus on high-level logic, complex motion sequencing, and scalability — transforming ideas into cinematic experiences with surgical speed.

blocks.title: Beyond the Browser
blocks.body: When the GSAP timeline stops, you'll find me in high-intensity training, competitive gaming, or catching up on the latest anime — always with the same precision I apply to code.

experience.desc: Building high-performance web experiences for clients worldwide. Specializing in motion-driven UIs, GSAP animations, and full-stack React/Node applications.
Developed and shipped multiple production-grade projects including landing pages, marketplaces, and AI-powered tools.
Studying software engineering, machine learning, data structures, and distributed systems.
Started with curiosity — how a few lines could change what people see on a screen.

contact.heading: Let's build something.
contact.subtext: Open to freelance projects, collaborations, and full-time opportunities.
